Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts a group of "recipe rut" moms.
Video.title: Vinaigrettes Aren't Just for Salads

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: Emeril prepares coffee-infused recipes.
Video.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Image.alt: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Video.summary: Did you know that Louisiana is the country's biggest producer of blue crabs? Celebrate the blue crab with Emeril's crab and corn fritters, chilled avocado soup with crab relish, and crabmeat stuffed trout with vodka butter sauce.
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: Subtley sweet, Emeril makes the most of figs: Goat Cheese Tart with Prosciutto and Port-Macerated Figs; Seared Duck Breasts with Spiced Fig Jam; Bucatini with Figs and Gorgonzola Sauce.
Video.title: Fig Envy

Video.summary: Tailgate Houston-style: grilled jalapeno poppers, chili con queso, and ancho-rubbed flap steak.
Video.title: Houston Texans

Video.summary: Inspired by Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite pecan recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Aaron Sanchez enjoy a Cuban-inspired menu with a New Orleans spin.
Video.title: with Aaron Sanchez

Video.summary: Emeril and Lindsey Brower and Nan Wallis create a meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.
Video.title: with Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare brunch dishes.
Video.title: with Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Ragout of Chanterelles with Route, Smoked Mushrooms with Tasso over Angel Hair Pasta
Video.title: Mushrooms

Video.summary: Oodles of Noodles: Pad Thai, Bahn Pho Bo, Soba, Lo Mein.
Video.title: Oodles of Noodles

Video.summary: Oyster Shooters, Steamed Blue Crabs, Citrus-Crusted Tuna with Beer Sauce
Video.title: Maryland by the Sea

Video.summary: Treat guests to Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp? Emeril presents two delicious recipes.
Video.title: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Image.alt: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Video.summary: Southwest Cheese Tart, Pico de Gallo, Pecan Pancakes with Boar Sausage
Video.title: Breakfast

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Asian-American communities who value Morning Glory, a highly invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.
Video.title: Illegal Greens: Morning Glory

Video.summary: For a New York style tailgate, indulge in some of New York City's Italian favorites.
Video.title: New York Jets

Video.summary: Veal Blanquette with Soft Polenta, Veal Marsala
Video.title: Veal

Video.summary: Mango and Coconut Pie with Mango Coulis, Chocolate Cream Pie
Video.title: Cream Pie

Video.summary: At the next home game, turn classic dinner dishes into a fancy tailgate meal.
Video.title: Jacksonville Jaguars

Video.summary: Cali-style carne asada burritos, and crowd-pleasing chicken and green chile nachos.
Video.title: Los Angeles Rams

Video.summary: Basic Dough, Parker House Rolls
Video.title: Background Breads

Video.summary: Chicken Tortilla Soup, Pumpkin Soup
Video.title: More Creative Soups

Video.summary: Potato Crusted Chicken, Creole Succotash, Boursin-Stuffed Chicken Breast, Walnuts and Spinach
Video.title: Creative Chicken

Video.summary: Barbecue Turkey, Grilled Prawns with Caviar
Video.title: Grill Show

Video.summary: Baked Stuffed Radicchio, Scallop Radicchio Cups
Video.title: Radicchio

Video.summary: Classically Seasoned Confit, Rilly Rillette, Pasta with Confit
Video.title: Confit

Video.summary: You don't have to sacrifice taste when eating light! Emeril prepares cod in miso broth with enoki mushrooms, edamame, and pea sprouts, and Thai-style beef salad with cabbages and julienned carrots
Video.title: Light and Easy Does It

Video.summary: Emeril will how you how to create authentic Mexican flavors: chicken and green chile tamales with roasted tomato salsa and tres leches cake
Video.title: Tamales

Video.summary: What can you cook when there's nothing in the pantry? Emeril shares recipes that require minimal ingredients: vegetable frittata, easy fettuccine with bacon and peas, and roasted garlic soup.
Video.title: What to Cook When There's Nothing in the Pantry

Image.alt: What to Cook When There's Nothing in the Pantry
What to Cook When There's Nothing in the Pantry
What to Cook When There's Nothing in the Pantry

Video.summary: Turkey Bolognese, Duck and Sausage Etouffee, Emeril's Chicken Pot Pies
Video.title: Home Cookin'

Video.summary: Summer Rolls with Hot Mustard Sauce, Orzo Stuffed Tomatoes, Pasta with Chickpeas and Spinach, Portobello Mushroom Burgers, Cherries Jubilee with Lady Fingers
Video.title: Vegetarian Delights

Video.summary: Honey Date Nut Muffins with Orange Honey Butter, Spicy Honey Barbecued Chicken, Honeyed Apple Cabbage Slaw, Baklava
Video.title: Nuttin' but Honey

Video.summary: Creative Casseroles: Eggplant, Sausage and Ziti, Mexican Breakfast.
Video.title: Creative Casseroles
